name: invinoveritas
description: Lightning-native AI reasoning, decisions, memory, orchestration, and agent marketplace. Pay-per-use via Bitcoin Lightning (Bearer + L402). No subscriptions, no KYC.

env.name: INVINO_API_KEY
env.description: Your invinoveritas Bearer token. Register at https://api.babyblueviper.com/register — pay ~1000 sats via Lightning, receive your key + 5 free calls.

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Deep strategic reasoning via natural language. ~500 sats per call.

tools.name: decision
tools.description: Structured decision intelligence. Returns decision, confidence score, reasoning, and risk level. ~1000 sats per call.

tools.name: orchestrate
tools.description: Multi-agent task orchestration with dependency resolution and risk scoring. ~2000 sats per call.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Persist key-value context for agents across sessions. ~2 sats/KB.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all stored memory keys for an agent. Free.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a stored memory entry. Free.

tools.name: offers_list
tools.description: Browse the Lightning-native agent marketplace. Free.

tools.name: offers_create
tools.description: List an AI service for sale. Seller receives 95% of every sale instantly via Lightning.

tools.name: offers_buy
tools.description: Purchase a marketplace listing. Seller paid instantly.
